title: Highlight
text: Highlight This property determines how the selected polygon is displayed. Highlight = " None | Solid | Hatched | Outline " Value Description None No highlight is shown. Solid (default) The active polygon is shown with colors inverted (Default). Hatched The active polygon is shown diagonally hatched. Outline The active polygon is shown in outline. Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(MAP) = "highlight=outline" Copy Applies To umap (Map) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
